response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned full-stack engineer with 15+ years of professional experience and strong TypeScript, Node.js, and React coverage across multiple production environments. His current role involves hands-on AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which directly matches the AI agent development requirement. He brings solid TDD discipline, cloud (AWS CDK), containerization (Docker/Kubernetes), and NoSQL (MongoDB) experience. The main gaps are the absence of Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, and Python from his stated stack — these are real misses against the required skill list, but given the depth of his engineering background they represent learnable gaps rather than disqualifiers.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack engineering with TypeScript, Node.js, and React at scale across multiple industries
Active AI-agent and MCP development experience in current role, directly satisfying an explicit requirement
Strong TDD culture backed by open-source testing libraries, conference talks, and training workshops
concerns: Nest.js, Vitest, and Playwright are absent from the resume despite being primary/required stack items
Kotlin and Python not mentioned anywhere, both listed as required proficiencies
Relational database experience appears limited; PostgreSQL is not referenced and SQL depth is unclear

key_factors.factor: Breadth and depth of full-stack seniority
